subject: feat(config): add WordPress-inspired themes, fonts, and look presets
body:
Add design tokens derived from WordPress default themes (2010–2025):

- 8 new fonts: Manrope, Libre Franklin, Source Sans 3, Source Serif 4,
  Bitter, Cardo, Literata, Noto Serif (bringing total to 23)
- 8 new color themes: Classic (TT22 teal+peach), Pastel (TT21 sage),
  Warm (TT13 beige+orange), Cream (TT20), Editorial (TT24 rust),
  Midnight (TT25 dark+yellow), Dusk (TT25 purple+lilac), Grove (TT23 neon green)
- 5 new look presets: Editorial (Cardo+Inter), Pastel (Manrope),
  Typeset (Merriweather+Source Sans), Brutalist (Source Serif+Libre Franklin),
  Vivid (Bitter+Source Sans)
- buildLayouts helper to reduce layout definition boilerplate

Tags: config, themes, fonts, looks, wordpress, design-tokens
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: wordpress-design-tokens
Semver: minor
